title: Add handle_info for PubSub broadcast + stream_insert
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/activity_feed_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ActivityFeedLive). mount/3 gates a PubSub.subscribe to "activity:org:#{org_id}" on connected? and initializes stream(:activities, []). handle_info({:activity, event}, socket) inserts into the stream at position 0 with stream_insert. handle_params/3 loads initial activity via MyApp.Activity.list(org_id) and streams with reset: true. mount takes %{"org_id" => org_id} from session.
tier_rationale: Multi-concept combo: scoped topic + connected gate + stream wiring + handle_info routing.
